fields.title: Develop yourself within 6 months
fields.description: Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised in the 1960s with the release of Letraset sheets containing Lorem Ipsum passages, and more recently with desktop publishing software like Aldus PageMaker including versions of Lorem Ipsum.
fields.learning_outcomes:
Set clear personal and professional goals within 6 months

Develop a consistent daily routine to boost productivity

Identify and overcome limiting beliefs that hold you back

Improve time management skills for efficient work and study

Enhance communication and interpersonal skills

Build self-discipline and resilience during challenging situations

Adopt healthy habits for body, mind, and emotional well-being

Learn to prioritize tasks and make effective decisions

Track personal growth and measure progress regularly

Create a long-term action plan for continued self-development
fields.requirements:
Willingness to commit at least 30 minutes daily to personal development

Open mindset to learn new habits and perspectives

Basic self-awareness of strengths and weaknesses

Access to a notebook or digital tool for tracking goals and progress

Motivation to implement practical exercises consistently

fields.title: Finnish Language
fields.description:
ဒီသင်တန်းမှာ ဘာတွေ သင်မလဲ
• Finnish Alphabet နှင့် အသံထွက်
• ကိုယ့်ကိုယ်ကို မိတ်ဆက်ပုံ (Introducing yourself)
• Everyday Finnish conversation
• Numbers, days, time
• Basic Finnish grammar
• Shop, hospital, work place တွင် အသုံးပြုနည်းတွေ သိလာရမယ်။
fields.learning_outcomes:
ဘယ်လိုလူတွေ ဒီသင်တန်းကို တက်သင့်လဲ
• ဖင်လန်နိုင်ငံကို လာဖို့ စီစဉ်နေသူများ
• ဖင်လန်မှာ နေထိုင်နေပြီး Finnish မသိသေးသူများ
• Finnish ကို အခြေခံကနေ စပြီး လေ့လာချင်သူများ
• ဖင်လန်မှာ အလုပ်ရှာဖို့ Finnish လိုအပ်နေသူများ
• Finnish စကားကို ယုံကြည်မှုရှိရှိ ပြောတတ်ချင်သူများ
.အဓိက အကျဆုံး အချက်ကတော့ အလုပ် ကောင်းကောင်း ကို မြန်မြန်ရချင်ရင် ဘာသာစကား သေသေချာချာ ရဖို့လိုပါတယ် ။
.အရည်အချင်းတူနေရင်တောင် ဘာသာစကားရသူက အခွင့်အရေးသာမှာမို့ ဘာသာစကားလေ့လာသင့်ပါတယ် ။ 
 ဒီသင်တန်းကနေ ရနိုင်သော အကျိုးကျေးဇူးများ
- Finnish အခြေခံကို နားလည်လာမယ်
- နေ့စဉ်အသုံးပြုတဲ့ Finnish စကားများ ပြောနိုင်လာမယ်
- Finnish grammar အခြေခံကို သိလာမယ်
-Shop, hospital, work place မှာ  အသုံးပြုနိုင်မယ့် Finnish ကို သိလာမယ်
-Finnish ပြောဖို့ ယုံကြည်မှု ပိုလာမယ်.

နောက်ဆုံးတစ်ချက်က ကိုယ်တိုင်လေ့လာရင်း သိခဲ့ရတဲ့ အခက်အခဲတွေ အလွယ်မှတ်နည်းတွေ မျှဝေပေးမှာမို့ အလုပ်မြန်မြန်ရချင်သူတွေနဲ့မင်္ဂလာပါ။
fields.requirements:
Finnish ဘာသာစကားကို စတင်လေ့လာသူတွေ ကြုံတွေ့ရတဲ့ grammar အခက်အခဲများ၊ စကားပြောရမှာ ကြောက်ရွံ့မှုများ၊ နားမလည်တဲ့ အပိုင်းတွေကို ကောင်းစွာ   နားလည်ပြီး  ကျောင်းသားများအချိန်သက်သာစွာနဲ့ လေ့လာဖို့ ကူညီပေးနိုင်မယ် လို့ ယုံကြည်ပါတယ်။
 ဒီသင်တန်းမှာ ဘာတွေ သင်မလဲ
• Finnish Alphabet နှင့် အသံထွက်
• ကိုယ့်ကိုယ်ကို မိတ်ဆက်ပုံ (Introducing yourself)
• Everyday Finnish conversation
• Numbers, days, time
• Basic Finnish grammar
• Shop, hospital, work place တွင် အသုံးပြုနည်းတွေ သိလာရမယ်။

.အရည်အချင်းတူနေရင်တောင် ဘာသာစကားရသူက အခွင့်အရေးသာမှာမို့ ဘာသာစကားလေ့လာသင့်ပါတယ် ။

- Finnish အခြေခံကို နားလည်လာမယ်
- နေ့စဉ်အသုံးပြုတဲ့ Finnish စကားများ ပြောနိုင်လာမယ်
- Finnish grammar အခြေခံကို သိလာမယ်
-Shop, hospital, work place မှာ  အသုံးပြုနိုင်မယ့် Finnish ကို သိလာမယ်
-Finnish ပြောဖို့ ယုံကြည်မှု ပိုလာမယ်.

နောက်ဆုံးတစ်ချက်က ကိုယ်တိုင်လေ့လာရင်း သိခဲ့ရတဲ့ အခက်အခဲတွေ အလွယ်မှတ်နည်းတွေ မျှဝေပေးမှာမို့ အလုပ်မြန်မြန်ရချင်သူတွေနဲ့ ကျောင်းဝင်ခွင့်မြန်မြန် ရချင်သူတွေ အတွက် ကျောင်းသားက တကယ်သာ လိုက်လုပ်မယ်ဆိုရင် ပေးရတဲ့ အ ချိန်ထက်ပိုတဲ့ ရလာဒ်ထွက်လာဖို့ ယုံကြည်ပါတယ် ။ ကျောင်းဝင်ခွင့်မြန်မြန် ရချင်သူတွေ အတွက် ကျောင်းသားက တကယ်သာ လိုက်လုပ်မယ်ဆိုရင် ပေးရတဲ့ အ ချိန်ထက်ပိုတဲ့ ရလာဒ်ထွက်လာဖို့ ယုံကြည်ပါတယ် ။

fields.name: Ida Keränen
fields.about:
Hi everyone,
my name is Ida. I live in a town called Joensuu where I'm finishing my degree at the University of Eastern Finland. My major subject is literature and minor subjects are Finnish language and pedagogical studies for subject teachers.
I've been teaching Finnish to foreigners since May 2020. I teach privately online and in person at an adult education center in Joensuu. During these years I've met students from all around the world and from all skill levels. Teaching Finnish is very meaningful to me because I can help people create a better life for themselves. I also enjoy the variety - each working day is different from the last.
I'm a positive and social person. I enjoy communicating with different people and I get to know people easily. I'm also very flexible and willing to try new ways to teach and guide students. Challenges motivate me to grow and develop my skills.
Reading and writing are my greatest passions. I read a lot of books both in Finnish and in English. I also have multiple on-going writing projects. My other hobbies are cooking, baking and handcrafts, especially knitting.

fields.name: Rev.Dr. Shawng Htoi Lahpai
fields.position: KEM Founder, KEME Senior Board Member, Education & Spiritual Leader
fields.about:
Born in one of the villages of the North Kachin State, JingRang Hkang, Putao of Northern Burma,  grew up in a pastoral family, taking up assigned mission tasks over the years. Under my mother’s custodianship, I could establish my foundational education and further pursue it in a heavenly atmosphere, free from the oppression of The Military Regime. Eventually, such passion for educational understanding and dynamics allowed me to majorize in religious studies, business leadership, etc. In my several academic masters and starting from the  University of Mandalay, and Southern Methodist University, SMU of Dallas, Texas. Educational trajectories would be vital to unlocking the world communities, including Burma, into one safer and cooperating enterprise. Working for American Life Insurance and Financial companies for
three years, I professionalised myself as a Retirement Financial planner, both in Life & annuity, driven to create the need of Burmese-Asian-American communities. Admittedly, it is my honor, trust, and confidence to work with the Consortium and Michael Christy, the Founder, and CEO, who is also my GA upline in my Ameritas financial service for extending generous advice, services, and leadership possible in time of my need. Usually, I work from my home office: 14306 Rosharomy homn, Texas, 77583.

My wife and I have three children in our 22 years of marriage. Simon Zau is in a university preparing for his teaching carrier and professional in physics. Of course, Ing Lahpai, aka Tasia, is our daughter who plays violin in the church where I administer the pastoral ministry. She is also a proud  agent because of her progression to the insurance financial system and her college. Our youngest, Gibson, is in primary school, and he loves playing games and Monopoly, yet he is friendly and thoughtful. I love reading and writing an academic one, which I still do.

fields.name: Nyein Nyein Ei San
fields.about:
မင်္ဂလာပါ။
ကျွန်မနာမည်က ဒေါ်ငြိမ်းငြိမ်းအိစံဖြစ်ပါတယ်။ လက်ရှိမှာ ဖင်လန်နိုင်ငံတွင် နေထိုင်ပြီး အလုပ်လုပ်ရင်းကျောင်းဆက်တက်နေသူဖြစ်ပါတယ် ။ 
ကျွန်မ မြန်မာနိုင်ငံမှာ မူလတန်းပြ ၊အလယ်တန်းပြ ၊အထက်တန်းပြရာထူးတွေနဲ့ စုစုပေါင်းပညာရလုပ်သက်(၁၆)နှစ်ရှိခဲ့ပါတယ် ။   နောက်ထပ် ဖင်လန်မှာ အလယ်တန်း၊ အထက်တန်း တက်နေတဲ့ ကလေးတွေကို ဖင်လန်ဘာသာစကားကိုကြားခံထားလို့ သူတို့ရဲ့ ရူပဗေဒ၊ဓာတုဗေဒဘာသာရပ်တွေကို ကူညီရှင်းပြပေးတဲ့ တန်းခွဲတွေ ၊မြန်မာ နိုင်ငံက ဖင်လန်ကို လာချင်တဲ့ ကလေးတွေကို အသက်အရွယ်အုပ်စုလိုက်ခွဲပြီး ဖင်လန်ဘာသာစကားကို သင်ကြားပေးနေပါတယ်။ လက်ရှိမှာ ကိုယ်တိုင်ကလ ည်း ဘယသာစကားကျောင်းကို ဆက်တင်နေရင်း အလုပ်ထဲမှာလဲ ဖင်လန်ဘာသာစကားကို အသုံးပြုနေရသယတစ်ဦးဖြစ်ပါတယ်။   မြန်မာနိုင်ငံသားကလေးတွေ 
 Finnish ဘာသာစကားကို စတင်လေ့လာသူတွေ ကြုံတွေ့ရတဲ့ grammar အခက်အခဲများ၊ စကားပြောရမှာ ကြောက်ရွံ့မှုများ၊ နားမလည်တဲ့ အပိုင်းတွေကို ကောင်းစွာ   နားလည်ပြီး  ကျောင်းသားများအချိန်သက်သာစွာနဲ့ လေ့လာဖို့ ကူညီပေးနိုင်မယ် လို့ ယုံကြည်ပါတယ်။

fields.title: Visit to Riveria Vocational Education Campus – 4 February 2026
fields.description:
We are pleased to report on a significant and productive engagement held on 4 February 2026, during which representatives of Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry visited the Riveria vocational education campus in Finland.
Riveria stands as one of the foremost providers of vocational education and training (VET) in Finland, offering a wide array of qualifications across multiple fields, including apprenticeship programmes, continuing professional development, and workforce-oriented training. The institution maintains campuses in several locations, such as Joensuu, and delivers education that emphasises accessibility for learners and openness to labour market needs.
We extend our sincere gratitude to Riveria for generously hosting our delegation and facilitating in-depth discussions on the Finnish Vocational Education and Training system. These exchanges provided valuable insights into innovative pedagogical approaches, practical skill development, apprenticeship models, and strategies for supporting diverse student populations, including international learners.
Particular appreciation is due to Trainer Eija (Tr. Eija), whose exemplary dedication, kindness, and professional expertise have made a lasting and positive impact on numerous Myanmar students. Her compassionate support, tireless assistance, and commitment to guiding students through their educational and integration journeys are deeply admired and highly valued by our community.
We are profoundly thankful for the time, hospitality, and guidance extended to us during this visit. Such collaborative opportunities greatly enhance our understanding and strengthen our efforts to support educational advancement and empowerment for youth from Myanmar and other regions.
May divine blessings continue to guide and reward all those who contribute selflessly to education and humanitarian service.

#Thankyou
#04.02.2026

fields.title: Staff Meeting in Joensuu – 4 February 2026
fields.description:
We are pleased to share a meaningful highlight from our recent activities in Joensuu, Finland.
On 4 February 2026, members of Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry had the privilege of meeting with our esteemed Board Member and dedicated Finnish language teacher, Ida Keränen.
Ms. Keränen exemplifies exceptional qualities of kindness, generosity, and unwavering support. Her steadfast commitment and warm-hearted contributions have been invaluable to the work of KEME. Through her guidance, encouragement, and active involvement, she continues to enrich our community and advance our shared mission of providing educational opportunities, vocational training, and holistic support to youth in Finland, Europe, and beyond.
We extend our profound gratitude to Ida for her tireless dedication and the positive impact she has on students, staff, and all associated with the organisation. Your presence and efforts strengthen our collective pursuit of empowerment through education and humanitarian service.

https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1DUCCcaud2/?mibextid=wwXIfr


#04.02.2026
#keepmovingforward

fields.title: A Day of Warmth and Fellowship in the Heart of the Czech Republic 🇨🇿
fields.description:
Sometimes, the most profound moments on a mission journey happen not in a conference hall or a lecture room, but around a table, sharing a meal with friends. This week, our team had the incredible privilege of experiencing just that in the beautiful Czech Republic.

We were welcomed into the home of our deeply respected Coordinator, Hpung Tau Myi Tung Naw Ja, for a day that will stay in our hearts for a long time. From the moment we arrived, we were enveloped in the warmth and generosity of him, his lovely wife, and their entire family.

A Taste of Home and Heritage

True hospitality often speaks through food, and our hosts expressed it beautifully. They prepared a delicious, traditional meal that was a feast for both the palate and the soul. Sharing this home-cooked food was more than just eating; it was a chance to connect with the local culture and feel the genuine care that went into every dish. We are so grateful for their kindness in opening their home and sharing this piece of their heritage with us.

More Than Just a Meal: Strengthening Our Mission

The afternoon was filled with precious moments of fellowship and laughter. But as is always the case with this dedicated team, the conversation naturally turned to the work that unites us.

We engaged in valuable and inspiring discussions about our shared initiatives and the future of Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry (KEME) . These weren't just formal talks; they were a heartfelt exchange of ideas and visions for the young people and communities we serve.

Sitting together, we were reminded of the power of partnership. These conversations didn't just strengthen our plans; they strengthened our commitment. We left feeling re-energized and inspired to continue serving youth with even greater dedication, knowing we have such a supportive and passionate team on the ground.

A Heartfelt Thank You

To our dear brother Hpung Tau Myi Tung Naw Ja and his wonderful family: thank you. Thank you for the heartfelt welcome, the meaningful conversations, and the truly memorable day.

Your friendship and support are a tremendous blessing to all of us at KEME. Days like this are a powerful reminder of why we do what we do. We are not just colleagues; we are a family united by a shared mission.

Here's to many more moments of fellowship and to the important work that lies ahead!

---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #CzechRepublic #Prague #Gratitude #Fellowship #Community #MissionWork #18.02.2026

fields.title: Exciting Opportunity! April Intake for Food Production Program in Finland 🇫🇮
fields.description:
We are absolutely thrilled to share some wonderful news for all our friends and followers! The Kingdom Education Mission Euro Ry (KEME) is pleased to announce a fantastic educational opportunity for the upcoming April Intake.

Study in Finland with the VET Program

For those who have dreamed of studying in Finland, here is your chance! We are introducing a school opening this April offering the Food Production program under Finland's renowned Vocational Education and Training (VET) system.

Finland is famous worldwide for its exceptional education system, and this is an opportunity to experience it firsthand while gaining valuable skills for your future.

Who Can Apply? 👩‍🎓

This opportunity is perfect for you if:

· You are interested in Food Production or the Food Industry – Whether you have previous experience or simply a passion for working with food, this program could be your path forward.
· You are curious about Finland's education system – Experience one of the best education systems in the world.
· You love the European lifestyle – Immerse yourself in Finnish culture and the beauty of Northern Europe.

How to Get Started 📝

Taking the first step is easy! All the requirements and detailed information are available through the KEME link below:

👉 Click Here to Access the Application Form

Need More Information? 📩

We're here to help! If you have questions or need clarification, you can reach us through:

· Facebook Messenger – Send us a message for quick responses
· Email: info@keme.fi – We'll get back to you as soon as possible

Don't Wait – Opportunities Are Limited! ✨

The April Intake has limited spots available. If you're interested, we encourage you not to miss this chance. Contact us as soon as possible to secure your place!

This could be the beginning of an incredible journey – studying in Finland, experiencing European culture, and building a brighter future.

Thank you, and we look forward to hearing from you! 🙏
                   ……………………………………………

fields.title: Building Bridges of Faith: A Fruitful Visit to the Baptist Union of the Czech Republic 🇨🇿
fields.description:
In the work of ministry, few things are as encouraging as finding kindred spirits—brothers and sisters who share not only the same faith but the same passion for serving the next generation. During our recent travels, we had the profound privilege of connecting with just such a community in the heart of the Czech Republic.

We are pleased to share a moment of gratitude and reflection following our recent visit to the Baptist Union of the Czech Republic (Bratrská jednota baptistů) .

A Warm Welcome in Prague

On behalf of Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry (KEME), we extend our heartfelt thanks to General Secretary Jan Jackanič for the generous hospitality, valuable time, and warm welcome extended to us during our meeting and church visit.

From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with openness and genuine Christian kindness. It was clear that this was more than a formal meeting—it was a gathering of fellow laborers in the field of God's kingdom.

A Sanctuary of Inspiration

We were given the opportunity to tour the inspiring sanctuary—a space that not only reflects the rich history of the Baptist Union but also stands as a testament to their ongoing commitment to worship, community, and outreach. Walking through its halls, we could feel the prayers offered and the lives touched within those walls.

Conversations with Purpose

The heart of our visit, however, lay in the constructive discussions we shared. Together with General Secretary Jan Jackanič, we explored shared opportunities for collaboration that could bear fruit for years to come.

Our conversation focused particularly on supporting Kachin youth through:

· Summer youth camp programmes that provide spiritual growth, fellowship, and life skills
· Educational initiatives that empower young people for a brighter future
· Spiritual development opportunities that ground them in faith and purpose

It was inspiring to find such alignment in our visions for youth ministry and community development.

A Partnership Blessed by Christ

We are deeply grateful for this opportunity and for the fellowship extended in Christ. These are the moments that remind us why we do what we do—because when we come together across cultures and countries, united by a common faith and a common mission, the impact is multiplied.

As we look ahead, we are excited about what this partnership may bring. Together, we believe we can create meaningful experiences for young people that will shape not just their futures, but the future of entire communities.

Prayers and Blessings

To General Secretary Jan Jackanič and the entire Bratrská jednota baptistů family:

May the Lord continue to bless your ministries and guide all our shared endeavours. We look forward to staying in close touch and working together for the glory of His name and the good of His people.

With sincere appreciation and warm regards,

The KEME Team
Lahti, Finland

---

📧 info@keme.fi | 🌐 keme.fi

---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #CzechRepublic #BaptistUnion #BratrskáJednotaBaptistů #Partnership #YouthMinistry #KachinYouth #FaithInAction #Gratitude #26.02.2026

fields.title: Good News: A Door Opens for Our Mission in Finland! 🇫🇮✨
fields.description:
Some moments stop you in your tracks—not because they are unexpected, but because they are so clearly an answer to prayer. Today, we are overjoyed to share one of those moments with you.

Visa Approval: A Milestone Reached! 🌟🙌

We are thrilled to announce that the Schengen visa applications for Maji Hkawng and Yaku Sumlut Jacob have been approved!

This is more than just a bureaucratic process completed—it is a significant milestone for Kingdom Education Mission Euro Ry (KEME) . With this door now open, our board members can carry out vital official responsibilities and strategic planning right here in Finland.

What This Means for Our Mission

Having Maji Hkawng and Yaku Sumlut Jacob with us in Finland is not just about meetings and paperwork. It is about:

· Strengthening our leadership through in-person collaboration
· Deepening our strategic planning for future initiatives
· Building stronger connections with our partners and communities
· Advancing our mission to serve youth and families across Europe

When leaders can gather face-to-face, something powerful happens. Vision becomes clearer. Relationships grow deeper. And the work moves forward with renewed energy and purpose.

A Heartfelt Thank You

None of this happened in isolation. Behind every approval, every step forward, there is a community that believed, prayed, and supported along the way.

Thank you, Lord, for opening this door. Your timing is always perfect, and we trust completely in Your guidance for the journey ahead.

And to our wonderful community—those who prayed, sent words of encouragement, and stood with us through every step: thank you from the bottom of our hearts. Your unwavering support carried us through, and we are truly blessed to have you with us.

Stay Tuned!

This is just the beginning. We are looking forward to sharing updates from this blessed journey as our board members arrive in Finland and begin their vital work.

There will be meetings, planning sessions, community gatherings, and—most importantly—meaningful steps forward in our mission to serve children, youth, and families across Europe.

So stay tuned. The best is yet to come!

---

#SchengenVisa #KingdomEducationMissionEurory #Finland #GratefulHeart #GodsTiming #MissionWork #AnsweredPrayers #CommunitySupport

fields.title: Annual General Meeting – 9 February 2026
fields.description:
On 9 February 2026, the Board of Directors of Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry (KEME) held its Annual General Meeting. The session proceeded successfully and allowed the Board to conduct a comprehensive review of the organisation’s activities and to discuss several matters of strategic importance.
The agenda included in-depth consideration of the following areas:
•  Ongoing and planned initiatives for student development
•  Progress and professional development opportunities for teaching and administrative staff
•  Formulation and refinement of medium- and long-term strategic objectives
•  Strengthening of investor relations and partnerships
•  Other key organisational and programmatic priorities
KEME reaffirms its core commitment to nurturing holistic student growth and to investing in high-quality teacher training and capacity-building programmes. In the period ahead, these two pillars will remain central, complemented by a range of infrastructure, curricular, and community-oriented development projects intended to further advance the organisation’s educational and humanitarian mission.
The Board extends its sincere appreciation to every individual, donor, partner institution, and supporter who has contributed time, resources, and encouragement to KEME’s work. Your sustained confidence in our vision and your active participation are essential to the progress achieved thus far and to the realisation of future goals.
We respectfully ask for your continued partnership as we move forward in service to education, personal development, and community well-being.
May divine guidance and blessing rest upon KEME, its students, staff, supporters, and all associated with its mission.

fields.title: A Breath of Fresh Air: Discovering Koivikon Kartano's Organic Dairy Farm in Finnish Karelia 🇫🇮
fields.description:
There is something truly special about stepping onto a farm where tradition meets innovation, and where the care for animals and the land is visible in every detail. During our Finnish farm tour, we had the absolute pleasure of visiting Koivikon Kartano in the beautiful Kiteen Puhos region—and it was an experience we will not soon forget.

A Warm Welcome to the Countryside

We would like to express our deepest gratitude to Mr. Naw Zet for his exceptionally warm and thoughtful hospitality in arranging this visit. From the moment we arrived, we felt welcomed and embraced by the peaceful Finnish countryside.

A very special thank you also goes to Mr. Pekka, the owner of this impressive organic dairy farm. We truly appreciated the time he generously shared with us, walking us through the farm's operations and engaging in insightful conversations about sustainable agriculture, animal welfare, and the future of organic farming. His passion for his work was evident in every word.

A Model of Modern Organic Farming

Koivikon Kartano is a shining example of what modern organic dairy farming can look like when done with care and excellence. Home to approximately 160 cows, the farm operates with a philosophy that puts animal wellbeing at the very center.

The cows are housed in a comfortable free-stall barn equipped with state-of-the-art robotic milking systems. This technology allows the cows to be milked on their own schedule, reducing stress and promoting natural behavior. But perhaps the most beautiful detail of all? During the grazing season, the cows are free to choose whether they spend their time indoors or out on the pasture. This freedom is a wonderful expression of animal welfare and respect for the creatures we steward.

From Farm to Table and Beyond

What makes Koivikon Kartano truly special is its diversification. This is not just a farm—it's a community hub. The high-quality organic milk produced here is supplied to Valio's Joensuu dairy, where it is transformed into delicious organic cheese. Knowing the journey from cow to cheese added a layer of appreciation for the food on our tables.

But the farm's offerings don't stop there. Visitors can explore the on-farm shop, stay in cozy accommodations, enjoy delicious meals at the restaurant, and even participate in community events. It is a beautiful model of how a farm can sustain not just a family, but an entire community.

A Memorable Experience and a Bright Future

It was a great pleasure to visit such a well-managed, diversified farm. We left Koivikon Kartano feeling inspired, educated, and deeply grateful for the warm welcome and knowledge shared with us.

As we continue our mission of serving youth and communities, visits like this remind us of the importance of sustainable living, respect for creation, and the power of passionate people to make a difference.

To Mr. Pekka, the entire team at Koivikon Kartano, and Mr. Naw Zet: thank you once again. We wish you continued success, good health, and many blessings in the years ahead.

Tutustu lisää: Koivikon Kartano

---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #FinnishFarmTour #OrganicFarming #KoivikonKartano #KiteenPuhos #SustainableAgriculture #AnimalWelfare #Valio #Gratitude #05.02.2026

fields.title: Building Bridges of Care: A Meaningful Visit to Altenzentrum St. Josef in Herxheim 🇩🇪
fields.description:
Every so often on our journey, we encounter a place that doesn't just show us how things are done—but shows us how things should be done. During our time in Germany, we had the profound privilege of visiting Altenzentrum St. Josef in Herxheim, and we left truly inspired.

On behalf of the entire Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry (KEME) team, we want to extend our deepest and most sincere gratitude for the warm and generous hospitality extended to us during our official visit.

A Window into Excellence in Elderly Care

From the moment we arrived, it was clear that Altenzentrum St. Josef is more than just a facility—it is a community built on compassion, dignity, and innovation.

We were honored to receive a comprehensive tour of both the hospital construction and the elderly care systems. It was truly inspiring to witness firsthand the ongoing development and the modern infrastructure designed with residents' wellbeing at its heart. Every detail, from the layout of the spaces to the daily routines, reflected a deep commitment to compassionate care.

One highlight that particularly stood out was the advanced therapeutic equipment, especially the special hydrotherapy bath. Seeing such thoughtful investment in technologies that enhance comfort and quality of life for the elderly was a powerful reminder of the importance of innovation in caregiving. We left with so many ideas and a renewed passion for elevating standards in our own work.

Conversations That Shape the Future

Beyond the facilities, we were deeply grateful for the meaningful discussions we shared about future partnerships and collaboration. Sitting down with the team at St. Josef, we explored ways to work together, share knowledge, and build a strong, fruitful relationship in the days ahead.

These conversations were not just about logistics or plans—they were about shared values. A mutual commitment to serving others with excellence, integrity, and love.

A Family Welcome

No visit is complete without the people who make it memorable, and we were truly blessed by the lovely family of Esther Shine and Mr. Andreas Marthaler.

Thank you for opening your beautiful home to us and welcoming us like family. The precious moments shared together—including time with your adorable little one—warmed our hearts and reminded us that these connections go far beyond professional partnerships. You showed us German hospitality at its finest, and we are so grateful.

Looking Ahead with Gratitude

To the entire team at Altenzentrum St. Josef: thank you once again for everything. Your hospitality, your time, and your open hearts have left a lasting impression on us.

We are truly blessed by this visit and look forward to staying in close touch. Together, we believe we can achieve great things for the communities we serve.

With sincere appreciation, warm regards, and many blessings,

The KEME Team

---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #ElderlyCare #Herxheim #Germany #Partnership #Gratitude #Caregiving #Community #FutureCollaboration

fields.title: A Parisian Blessing: Grace at the Eiffel Tower 🇫🇷
fields.description:
Some days feel like a direct gift from above. Today in Paris was exactly that—a beautiful, unforgettable blessing that left our hearts full and our spirits soaring.

As we stepped into the City of Light, we were reminded that this journey is not just about visiting new places; it's about witnessing the beauty of God's creation and the ingenuity of His children. And today, He gave us a moment we will cherish forever.

A Date with an Icon: The Eiffel Tower

By the amazing grace of God, we had the wonderful opportunity to visit the one and only Eiffel Tower (La Tour Eiffel).

Standing before this magnificent structure, it's hard to imagine that it was never meant to stay. Built in 1889 by the French engineer Gustave Eiffel for the World's Fair, this 324-metre iron lattice tower was originally planned as a temporary exhibit. Yet, here it stands—over 130 years later—as the beating heart of Paris and the most enduring symbol of France.

As we gazed up at its intricate ironwork stretching into the sky, we couldn't help but feel a sense of awe. It is one thing to see it in photographs, but quite another to stand in its shadow, to feel its presence, and to watch it gleam against the Parisian sky.

A Moment of Gratitude

Days like today are gentle reminders of the blessings that surround us. From the rich history embedded in every rivet of the tower to the joyful laughter of families and friends enjoying the park below, Paris offered us a moment of pure grace.

We are so thankful for the safe travels, the clear skies, and the chance to share this experience together as a team.

Thank You, Lord, for every moment of this blessed day. From the iconic landmarks to the quiet walks along the Seine, we carry these memories with us as we continue our mission.

À bientôt, Paris! (See you soon, Paris!)

---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #EiffelTower #Paris #France #Gratitude #Blessed #TravelDiaries #23.02.2026

fields.title: A Heartfelt Thank You to Our Friends in Amsterdam 🇳🇱
fields.description:
Some of the most beautiful moments on our journey across Europe happen when we are welcomed not just into a city, but into a community. Yesterday, in the enchanting city of Amsterdam, we experienced exactly that.

The Kingdom Education Mission Euro Ry (KEME) team had the distinct honor and pleasure of being hosted by the Kachin Community Netherlands (KCNL) . It was a day filled with warmth, connection, and the kind of fellowship that reminds us why our mission matters.

More Than a Visit: A Gathering of Hearts

From the moment we arrived, we were embraced by the genuine kindness of the Kachin community. The thoughtful arrangements and warm hospitality extended to us went far beyond simple courtesy—it was a true reflection of the spirit of unity and love that binds us all.

We are deeply grateful and truly appreciate each and every member of KCNL who took the time to welcome us, share a meal, and open their hearts.

Building Bridges, Strengthening Partnerships

One of our core goals during this tour is to build lasting relationships, and our time in Amsterdam was a perfect example of that mission in action. It was an absolute joy to meet everyone in person, to share stories, and to put faces to names.

These face-to-face connections are invaluable. They lay the foundation for strong partnerships and meaningful collaboration. We left Amsterdam feeling inspired and excited about the future we can build together.

Looking Forward to a Shared Future

This visit was more than just a stop on our itinerary; it was the beginning of a deeper relationship. We look forward to strengthening our partnership with KCNL in the years to come. Together, we believe we can have an even greater impact on the youth and communities we are both called to serve.

Thank you, Kachin Community Netherlands, from the bottom of our hearts. Your friendship is a blessing, and we are so grateful for you.

With warmest regards and gratitude,
KEME Team
---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #Amsterdam #Netherlands #KachinCommunityNetherlands #KCNL #Gratitude #Community #Partnership #Fellowship #22.02.2026

fields.title: A Blessed Sunday of Worship and Fellowship in Lahti 🇫🇮
fields.description:
There is something sacred about gathering together as a family of believers—lifting voices in praise, partaking in communion, and sitting under the teaching of God's Word. This past Sunday in Lahti, we experienced exactly that: a truly blessed time of worship and spiritual renewal.

Spirit-Led Worship at the Heart of the Service

The Sunday Worship Service was spiritually led by a KEME Senior Board Member, whose guidance set a reverent and worshipful tone for the entire gathering. From the opening prayers to the flow of the service, there was a tangible sense of the Holy Spirit moving among us.

A Sacred Moment: Holy Communion

We were deeply honored to have Pastor Naw Hkawng lead us in the observance of Holy Communion. With humility and reverence, he guided us to the table of remembrance—reflecting on the sacrifice of our Lord Jesus Christ and the new covenant sealed in His blood. It was a sacred and meaningful moment that united our hearts in gratitude and awe.

The Living Word: A Message for the Heart

The highlight of the service came as Sr. Yaku Sumlut delivered the Living Word of God. Opening the Scriptures with clarity and anointing, she shared a message that spoke directly to our hearts. 📖✝️

Her teaching reminded us of the power of God's Word to guide, correct, encourage, and transform. We left the service not just informed, but inspired—ready to live out the truths we had received.

A Heartfelt Thank You

We would like to extend our sincere gratitude to each and every one who joined our service program. Your presence, your prayers, and your participation made the day truly special. Whether you sang along, listened intently, or simply stood in agreement—you were a vital part of this gathering.

From the Lahti Family to KEME

The Lahti Family would like to express our heartfelt gratitude to the KEME Organization for your continued support, your spiritual covering, and your commitment to nurturing faith in every community you touch. Thank you for sending dedicated leaders to shepherd us and feed us with God's Word.

It is because of partners like you that we can gather, worship, and grow together in faith.

Looking Ahead with Hope

As we go into the new week, we carry the blessings of Sunday in our hearts. May the Word we heard take root and bear fruit. May the communion we shared remind us of our unity in Christ. And may the fellowship we enjoyed strengthen us for the journey ahead.

To everyone who was part of this blessed day:

May God continue to bless you abundantly. 🌿🙏

---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #Lahti #SundayWorship #HolyCommunion #TheWordOfGod #Faith #Fellowship #Gratitude #GodsBlessings

fields.title: A Heartfelt Thank You to Our Kachin Family in Germany 🇩🇪
fields.description:
There are moments in this journey that feel like coming home—even when you're far from home. Our recent visit to the Kachin Community Germany (KCG) was exactly that: a warm embrace from family, a gathering of hearts united by shared roots and a shared vision for the future.

On behalf of Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry (KEME), we want to say a very big THANK YOU to the entire Kachin community in Germany.

A Welcome We Will Never Forget

From the moment we arrived, we were surrounded by genuine warmth and kindness. The friendly meeting you organized was more than just an event—it was a beautiful reunion of hearts and souls.

To everyone who came and joined us: thank you. Your presence meant the world to us. Seeing so many familiar faces and meeting new ones reminded us of the strength and beauty of the Kachin community, no matter where in the world we find ourselves.

We also want to acknowledge the hard work and dedication of all KCG members who pour their love into serving this community. Behind every gathering, every conversation, every moment of connection, there is effort and sacrifice—and we see it. We appreciate it. Thank you.

Conversations That Matter

During our time together, we had good and important discussions about the future—not just for our organizations, but for the young people we both exist to serve.

We talked about:

· Supporting education for children and young people
· Providing help in difficult times for families in need
· Building better futures for kids from Kachin communities across Europe

It was inspiring to realize just how much we share the same heart. We both care deeply about the next generation. We both believe that with love, support, and opportunity, our children can thrive—no matter where they grow up.

Looking Ahead with Hope

These conversations were just the beginning. We hope to keep the dialogue going and to move toward real partnership projects that can make a tangible, positive difference in the lives of young people.

Whether through youth camps, educational programs, or community support initiatives, we believe that together—KEME and KCG—we can accomplish far more than we ever could alone.

We look forward to meeting you all again soon. Perhaps for more events, more meetings, or even joint projects that bring our shared vision to life.

Until We Meet Again

Thank you once more for your generosity, your friendship, and your warm hearts. In a world that can often feel divided, finding community is a treasure. And in you, we have found family.

We wish peace, good health, and many blessings to every member of the Kachin Community in Germany. May God continue to watch over you, guide you, and bless the work of your hands.

With sincere respect and gratitude,

The KEME Team
Lahti, Finland

---

#KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #KachinCommunityGermany #KCG #Gratitude #Community #Partnership #NextGeneration #KachinYouth #Family #01.03.2026

fields.title: Reflections at the Gate: A Day of History and Remembrance in Berlin 🇩🇪
fields.description:
There is something special about touching down in a city that has quite literally shaped the course of modern history. Today marked the beginning of our tour, and we had the profound privilege of spending it in Berlin—a city where the echoes of the past meet the pulse of the present.

Our day was a journey through triumph, tragedy, and resilience, shared with great company. Here is a glimpse into our meaningful introduction to the German capital.

A Symbol of Unity: The Brandenburg Gate

No visit to Berlin would be complete without standing in the shadow of its most iconic landmark. Our itinerary commenced at the magnificent Brandenburg Gate (Brandenburger Tor).

As we stood at this monumental neoclassical structure, it was impossible not to feel its weight. Once a symbol of division during the Cold War, it now stands proudly as an enduring emblem of German unity and peace. Seeing it up close, with its grand quadriga chariot atop, was a powerful reminder of how history can turn towards hope.

A Solemn Pause: The Holocaust Memorial

Just a short walk from the bustling energy of the Gate lies a place of profound silence and reflection. We visited the Memorial to the Murdered Jews of Europe, also known as the Holocaust Memorial.

Walking through the field of 2,711 grey concrete stelae is a deeply personal and moving experience. The ground undulates beneath your feet, and as you move deeper into the grid, the city noise fades away, replaced by a heavy, contemplative silence. The memorial is an abstract but powerful tribute to the millions of Jewish victims of the Holocaust, and it evoked deep reflection on one of history's darkest chapters. It is a sacred place that reminds us of our duty to remember.

Echoes of a Divided City: The Berlin Wall

Berlin’s story is one of division and reunification, and the remnants of its past are woven into the fabric of the city. We spent time exploring preserved sections of the Berlin Wall.

Standing before these concrete slabs, once a barrier of death and oppression, it's striking to see how they have been transformed. Now canvases for art and messages of freedom, they tell a story of resilience and the unbreakable human spirit. It was a grounding moment to witness the physical evidence of a city that was literally torn in two and has now grown back together, stronger than ever.

A Meaningful Beginning

As the day came to a close, we realized that Berlin had offered us more than just a tour; it had offered us a meaningful introduction to its complex soul. We walked away with a deeper understanding of its triumphs, its tragedies, and its incredible journey of reconciliation.

It was a day of history, reflection, and connection—and it was a privilege to share it in good company.

Warm regards from the heart of Germany,

The KEME Team

---

#Berlin #Germany #BrandenburgGate #HolocaustMemorial #BerlinWall #History #TravelDiaries #KEME #KingdomEducationMissionEuroRy #Reflection #20.02.2026

fields.title: Dinner time
fields.description:
Dear friends, partners, and supporters of 

Kingdom Education Mission Euro ry (KEME)
Today, March 10, 2026, we held our 
****************……………….*********************
Thanksgiving & Dedication Worship Program at our office in Lahti, Finland (Niemenkatu 73). People joined us both in the room and online. We came together to thank God and to dedicate our work to Him.

We are very thankful for everyone who gave their valuable time to be with us:
•  Those who came in person and shared food, talk, and prayer.
•  Those who joined online and helped us feel connected.

Your time and support help us continue our work: giving free education advice, job training, life skills, and spiritual help — especially to young people in Finland, Europe, and IDP camps in Myanmar.

We give special thanks to Rev. Dr. Lahpai Shawng Htoi.Thank you for preparing and sharing God’s Word with us. In these difficult times, your teaching was a great blessing and light for all of us.

Thank you again for your time and for letting God speak through you. May God bless you, keep you strong, and use you more for His kingdom.

We are grateful for all of you and look forward to working together in the future.

For more information:
Website: www.keme.fi
Email: info@keme.fi
Phone: +358 46 938 9339 / +358 46 594 7284

With thanks in Christ,
The KEME Team
Lahti, Finland
#KEME #Thanksgiving #GodsWord #Gratitude #Unity
